chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitution Petition No. D- 1924 of 2018 _________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge _________________________________________________________ Priority. 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of Misc. No. 8305/18 3. For hearing of main case. 18.10.2024. None present for the Petitioner. Mr. Khalid Mehmood Siddiqui, Advocate for Respondent. Mr. Kashif Nazeer, Assistant Attorney General. ********* None present on behalf of the petitioner nor any intimation received. Record reflects that on the last two consecutives dates, no one turned up on behalf of the Petitioner. In view of such position, petition is dismissed for non-prosecution with pending applications. JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz
